omitted_declarations.policy_reference:
■ Optional Data: You may also choose to enter additional health data points relevant to your Dr.
Blood Pressure: Diabetes management, such as time of day, medications taken, and notes about
your readings. We will only collect this data if you explicitly enter it.

■ Device Data: We collect certain device information to ensure the App functions properly and to improve
your experience. This information may include:
■ Device model (e.g., Pixel 6 Pro)
■ Operating system (e.g., Android 13)
■ De-identified crash logs (to identify and fix bugs)

■ Communicate: Contact you with updates, security alerts, and promotional messages through email or
other forms of communication.

Health Data:
■ Dr. Blood Pressure: Diabetes Readings: The core function of the App is to allow you to record and
monitor your Dr. Blood Pressure: Diabetes readings. This data is vital for you to track your health
trends and make informed decisions.
Communicate: Contact you with updates, security alerts, and promotional messages through email or other forms of communication.

Permission 3: android.permission.READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE
Allows the app to import images of blood sugar or blood pressure meters that users select for recording
activity.
